item.title: TikiTakaConnor: Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 1h “Go for it. Let's be ourselves and let's go for it. Put everything that we have on tha
item.description:
Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 1h “Go for it. Let's be ourselves and let's go for it. Put everything that we have on that pitch. Huge belief, huge conviction, and go for it because we are more than capable.”
Arteta’s final message to the players ahead of Manchester City - Arsenal Premier League showdown. 0:55 11 38 295 9 mil

Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 1min En respuesta a @TikiTakaConnor Watch Mikel’s final embargo on YouTube via @HaytersTV now. youtube.com HaytersTV 111 likes, 27 comments. "BELIEF AND CONVICTION | Mikel Arteta's FINAL message before Man City showdown" 259

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Pep Guardiola: “If we lose, I will shake hands with Mikel Arteta and I will pray
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Pep Guardiola: “If we lose, I will shake hands with Mikel Arteta and I will pray Arsenal lose the next five games to be champions…
…but I think it's not going to happen. So, try to win our game today”. 307 233 2 mil 33 mil
